initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost + i.amount) AS total_cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
GROUP BY m.first_name, m.last_name;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost + i.amount) AS total_cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
GROUP BY m.first_name, m.last_name;

SELECT 
    m.first_name, 
    m.last_name, 
    SUM(e.cost + i.amount) AS total_cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'
GROUP BY m.first_name, m.last_name;

JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
